ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the claims data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the claims data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the claims data */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "initial_claims" INTEGER /* Total number of initial claims filed on the specified date */,
  "initial_claims_rate" REAL /* Rate of initial claims filed per 100 residents in the city on that date */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., auto, home, health) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., filed, processed, closed) */,
  "claim_amount" TEXT /* Total amount claimed */,
  "paid_amount" TEXT /* Amount paid out for the claim */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the claim */,
  "claimant_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the claimant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "month", "day", "city_id", "claimant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the city data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Total number of initial claims filed on the specified date
Rate of initial claims filed per 100 residents in the city on that date
Type of claim (e.g., auto, home, health)
Status of the claim (e.g., filed, processed, closed)
Amount paid out for the claim
State in which the city is located
Area of the city in square kilometers
Last time the city data was updated
Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager)
Last time the user logged in
Unique identifier for each access log entry
Identifier for the user accessing the data
Timestamp of when the data was accessed
IP address of the user accessing the data
User agent string of the client accessing the data
Session ID for tracking user sessions
